title: Recruiting Funnel Intelligence
summary: Track stage conversion, sourcing quality, and recruiter throughput across hiring funnels.
knowledge_base: Recruiting Funnel Intelligence is positioned as a HRTech starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Track stage conversion, sourcing quality, and recruiter throughput across hiring funnels.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on recruiting, funnel, ops.
